summary: Created docs/loop-proof.md: a short, friendly proof-of-life note (5-8 lines) on branch handoff/loop-proof.r1.
The note confirms the AI Brain relay loop runs end to end with no human at the keyboard.
It describes the chain in plain English (Cowork drafts, Reny merges to approve, the 2-minute NUC timer catches it, the caged worker builds headless and opens a PR) and is dated 2026-07-14.

Opened PR #7 and stopped at 'PR ready' — no merge, no deploy, nothing outside this repo.
notes: Tiny proof-of-life task; nothing risky or unclear. Kill switches checked first (no handoff/STOP, NEXT-TASK.md was a real task). Charter honored: work confined to this repo, hard stop at 'PR ready' — human merge by Reny is the only deploy.
